working_on.feature: Universal Video Downloader & Default Audio Selection
working_on.task: Completed Wails tabbed interface, defaulted YouTube Music to m4a format, implemented multi-platform backend generic downloader, added missing Windows ffprobe dependency, and successfully ran Go unit tests
working_on.notes: Added a glassmorphic tab-selector interface. Solved a critical Windows environment bug where lack of ffprobe.exe caused postprocessing extraction to fail on TikTok.

pending_tasks.task: Build the final production package using: wails build -platform windows/amd64 -nsis

recent_changes.description: Multi-platform video downloader, YouTube Audio-only default format, integrated ffprobe binary downloader, and robust Go testing suite.

errors_encountered.error: yt-dlp Postprocessing: WARNING: unable to obtain file audio codec with ffprobe
errors_encountered.solution: Downloaded and extracted ffprobe.exe alongside ffmpeg.exe in C:\tools\, solving all Windows audio postprocessing issues.

errors_encountered.error: JSX closing tags mismatch in App.tsx
errors_encountered.solution: Corrected the self-closing tag on UniversalDownloader and div matching syntax.

decisions_made.decision: Add a dedicated 'Đa Nền Tảng' tab
decisions_made.reason: Simplifies UX by keeping YouTube's advanced options isolated from other multi-platform simple video/audio extraction.

decisions_made.decision: 2 format choices (Video/Audio) for Đa Nền Tảng tab
decisions_made.reason: Users typically download from TikTok/FB/Instagram as either raw video or parsed audio only.
